## LibraryData.ICollectionLoaderInitParams.fileNameConverter property

Optional converter to transform file names before applying the collection ID converter. Defaults to [removeJsonExtension](./ts-chocolate.librarydata.converters.removejsonextension.md)<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly fileNameConverter?: Converter<string>;
```
